dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eState-of-the-art multilingual text-to-speech (TTS) system, redefining the boundaries of voice generation.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eFish Audio S2 Pro is the most advanced multimodal model developed by \u003ca href=\"https://fish.audio/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eFish Audio\u003c/a\u003e. Trained on over \u003cstrong\u003e10 million hours\u003c/strong\u003e of audio data covering more than \u003cstrong\u003e80 languages\u003c/strong\u003e, S2 Pro combines a \u003cstrong\u003eDual-Autoregressive (Dual-AR)\u003c/strong\u003e architecture with reinforcement learning (RL) alignment to generate speech that is exceptionally natural, realistic, and emotionally rich, leading the competition among both open-source and closed-source systems.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe core strength of S2 Pro lies in its support for \u003cstrong\u003esub-word level\u003c/strong\u003e fine-grained control of prosody and emotion using natural language tags (e.g., \u003ccode\u003e[whisper]\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e[excited]\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e[angry]\u003c/code\u003e), while natively supporting multi-speaker and multi-turn conversation generation.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eVisit the \u003ca href=\"https://fish.audio/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eFish Audio website\u003c/a\u003e for a live playground, or read our \u003ca href=\"https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08823\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003etechnical report\u003c/a\u003e and \u003ca href=\"https://fish.audio/blog/fish-audio-open-sources-s2/\" rel=\"nofollow\"\u003eblog post\u003c/a\u003e for more details.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv Using simple \u003ccode\u003e[tag]\u003c/code\u003e syntax, you can precisely embed emotional instructions at any position in the text.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e15,000+ Unique Tags Supported\u003c/strong\u003e: Not limited to fixed presets; S2 supports \u003cstrong\u003efree-form text descriptions\u003c/strong\u003e. Try \u003ccode\u003e[whisper in small voice]\u003c/code\u003e, \u003ccode\u003e[professional broadcast tone]\u003c/code\u003e, or \u003ccode\u003e[pitch up]\u003c/code\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRich Emotion Library\u003c/strong\u003e:\n\u003ccode\u003e[pause]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[emphasis]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[singing]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[excited]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[laughing tone]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[interrupting]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[chuckling]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[excited tone]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[volume up]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[echo]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[angry]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[low volume]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[sigh]\u003c/code\u003e \u003ccode\u003e[low voice]\u003c/code\u003e consisting of a decoder-only transformer and an RVQ audio codec (10 codebooks, ~21 Hz):\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSlow AR (4B parameters)\u003c/strong\u003e: Operates along the time axis, predicting the primary semantic codebook.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFast AR (400M parameters)\u003c/strong\u003e: Generates the remaining 9 residual codebooks at each time step, reconstructing exquisite acoustic details.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis asymmetric design achieves peak audio fidelity while significantly boosting inference speed.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" for post-training alignment. We use the same model suite for data cleaning and annotation directly as Reward Models, perfectly resolving the distribution mismatch between pre-training data and post-training objectives.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eMulti-Dimensional Reward Signals\u003c/strong\u003e: Comprehensively evaluates semantic accuracy, instruction adherence, acoustic preference scoring, and timbre similarity to ensure every second of generated speech feels intuitive to humans.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv 100%;\"\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eFish Audio S2 allows users to upload reference audio containing multiple speakers, and the model processes each speaker's features via the \u003ccode\u003e\u0026lt;|speaker:i|\u0026gt;\u003c/code\u003e token. You can then control the model's performance via speaker ID tokens, enabling a single generation to include multiple speakers. There is no longer a need to upload separate reference audio for each individual speaker.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" Please refer to your local laws about DMCA and other related laws.","","## Quick Start","","### For Human","","Here are the official documents for Fish Audio S2, follow the instructions to get started easily.","","- [Installation](https://speech.fish.audio/install/)","- [Command Line Inference](https://speech.fish.audio/inference/#command-line-inference)","- [WebUI Inference](https://speech.fish.audio/inference/#webui-inference)","- [Server Inference](https://speech.fish.audio/server/)","- [Docker Setup](https://speech.fish.audio/install/#docker-setup)","","\u003e [!IMPORTANT]","\u003e **For SGLang server, please read [SGLang-Omni README](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang-omni/blob/main/sglang_omni/models/fishaudio_s2_pro/README.md).**","\u003e","\u003e **For vLLM Omni server, please read [vLLM-Omni Fish Speech S2 Pro Recipe](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/blob/main/recipes/fishaudio/Fish-Speech-S2-Pro.md) and the [User Guide](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-omni/blob/main/docs/user_guide/examples/online_serving/text_to_speech.md#fish-speech-s2-pro).**","","### For LLM Agent","","```","Install and configure Fish-Audio S2 by following the instructions here: https://speech.fish.audio/install/","```","","## Fish Audio S2 Pro","**State-of-the-art multilingual text-to-speech (TTS) system, redefining the boundaries of voice generation.**","","Fish Audio S2 Pro is the most advanced multimodal model developed by [Fish Audio](https://fish.audio/). Trained on over **10 million hours** of audio data covering more than **80 languages**, S2 Pro combines a **Dual-Autoregressive (Dual-AR)** architecture with reinforcement learning (RL) alignment to generate speech that is exceptionally natural, realistic, and emotionally rich, leading the competition among both open-source and closed-source systems.","","The core strength of S2 Pro lies in its support for **sub-word level** fine-grained control of prosody and emotion using natural language tags (e.g., `[whisper]`, `[excited]`, `[angry]`), while natively supporting multi-speaker and multi-turn conversation generation.","","Visit the [Fish Audio website](https://fish.audio/) for a live playground, or read our [technical report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08823) and [blog post](https://fish.audio/blog/fish-audio-open-sources-s2/) for more details.","","### Model Variants","","| Model | Size | Availability | Description |","|------|------|-------------|-------------|","| S2-Pro | 4B parameters | [HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/fishaudio/s2-pro) | Full-featured flagship model with maximum quality and stability |","","More details of the model can be found in the [technical report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.01156).","","## Benchmark Results","","| Benchmark | Fish Audio S2 |","|------|------|","| Seed-TTS Eval — WER (Chinese) | **0.54%** (best overall) |","| Seed-TTS Eval — WER (English) | **0.99%** (best overall) |","| Audio Turing Test (with instruction) | **0.515** posterior mean |","| EmergentTTS-Eval — Win Rate | **81.88%** (highest overall) |","| Fish Instruction Benchmark — TAR | **93.3%** |","| Fish Instruction Benchmark — Quality | **4.51 / 5.0** |","| Multilingual (MiniMax Testset) — Best WER | **11 of 24** languages |","| Multilingual (MiniMax Testset) — Best SIM | **17 of 24** languages |","","On Seed-TTS Eval, S2 achieves the lowest WER among all evaluated models including closed-source systems: Qwen3-TTS (0.77/1.24), MiniMax Speech-02 (0.99/1.90), Seed-TTS (1.12/2.25). On the Audio Turing Test, 0.515 surpasses Seed-TTS (0.417) by 24% and MiniMax-Speech (0.387) by 33%. On EmergentTTS-Eval, S2 achieves particularly strong results in paralinguistics (91.61% win rate), questions (84.41%), and syntactic complexity (83.39%).","","## Highlights","","\u003cimg src=\"./docs/assets/totalability.png\" width=200%\u003e","","### Fine-Grained Inline Control via Natural Language","","S2 Pro brings unprecedented \"soul\" to speech. Using simple `[tag]` syntax, you can precisely embed emotional instructions at any position in the text.","- **15,000+ Unique Tags Supported**: Not limited to fixed presets; S2 supports **free-form text descriptions**. Try `[whisper in small voice]`, `[professional broadcast tone]`, or `[pitch up]`.","- **Rich Emotion Library**:","  `[pause]` `[emphasis]` `[laughing]` `[inhale]` `[chuckle]` `[tsk]` `[singing]` `[excited]` `[laughing tone]` `[interrupting]` `[chuckling]` `[excited tone]` `[volume up]` `[echo]` `[angry]` `[low volume]` `[sigh]` `[low voice]` `[whisper]` `[screaming]` `[shouting]` `[loud]` `[surprised]` `[short pause]` `[exhale]` `[delight]` `[panting]` `[audience laughter]` `[with strong accent]` `[volume down]` `[clearing throat]` `[sad]` `[moaning]` `[shocked]`","","### Innovative Dual-Autoregressive (Dual-AR) Architecture","","S2 Pro adopts a master-slave Dual-AR architecture consisting of a decoder-only transformer and an RVQ audio codec (10 codebooks, ~21 Hz):","","- **Slow AR (4B parameters)**: Operates along the time axis, predicting the primary semantic codebook.","- **Fast AR (400M parameters)**: Generates the remaining 9 residual codebooks at each time step, reconstructing exquisite acoustic details.","","This asymmetric design achieves peak audio fidelity while significantly boosting inference speed.","","### Reinforcement Learning (RL) Alignment","","S2 Pro utilizes **Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)** for post-training alignment. We use the same model suite for data cleaning and annotation directly as Reward Models, perfectly resolving the distribution mismatch between pre-training data and post-training objectives.","- **Multi-Dimensional Reward Signals**: Comprehensively evaluates semantic accuracy, instruction adherence, acoustic preference scoring, and timbre similarity to ensure every second of generated speech feels intuitive to humans.","","### Extreme Streaming Performance (Powered by SGLang)","","As the Dual-AR architecture is structurally isomorphic to standard LLMs, S2 Pro natively supports all SGLang inference acceleration features, including Continuous Batching, Paged KV Cache, CUDA Graph, and RadixAttention-based Prefix Caching.","","**Performance on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU:**","- **Real-Time Factor (RTF)**: 0.195","- **Time-to-First-Audio (TTFA)**: ~100 ms","- **Extreme Throughput**: 3,000+ acoustic tokens/s while maintaining RTF \u003c 0.5","","### Robust Multilingual Support","","S2 Pro supports over 80 languages without requiring phonemes or language-specific preprocessing:","","- **Tier 1**: Japanese (ja), English (en), Chinese (zh)","- **Tier 2**: Korean (ko), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt), Arabic (ar), Russian (ru), French (fr), German (de)","- **Global Coverage**: sv, it, tr, no, nl, cy, eu, ca, da, gl, ta, hu, fi, pl, et, hi, la, ur, th, vi, jw, bn, yo, xsl, cs, sw, nn, he, ms, uk, id, kk, bg, lv, my, tl, sk, ne, fa, af, el, bo, hr, ro, sn, mi, yi, am, be, km, is, az, sd, br, sq, ps, mn, ht, ml, sr, sa, te, ka, bs, pa, lt, kn, si, hy, mr, as, gu, fo, etc.","","### Native Multi-Speaker Generation","","\u003cimg src=\"./docs/assets/chattemplate.png\" width=200%\u003e","","Fish Audio S2 allows users to upload reference audio containing multiple speakers, and the model processes each speaker's features via the `\u003c|speaker:i|\u003e` token. You can then control the model's performance via speaker ID tokens, enabling a single generation to include multiple speakers. There is no longer a need to upload separate reference audio for each individual speaker.","","### Multi-Turn Generation","","Thanks to the expansion of the model context, our model can now leverage previous information to improve the expressiveness of subsequent generated content, thereby increasing the naturalness of the dialogue.","","### Rapid Voice Cloning","","Fish Audio S2 supports accurate voice cloning using short reference samples (typically 10-30 seconds). The model captures timbre, speaking style, and emotional tendencies, producing realistic and consistent cloned voices without additional fine-tuning.","For SGLang Server usage, please refer to the [SGLang-Omni README](https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang-omni/blob/main/sglang_omni/models/fishaudio_s2_pro/README.md).","","---","","## Credits","","- [VITS2 <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fish Audio S2 Pro</h2><a id="user-content-fish-audio-s2-pro" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fish Audio S2 Pro" href="#fish-audio-s2-pro"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>State-of-the-art multilingual text-to-speech (TTS) system, redefining the boundaries of voice generation.</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">Fish Audio S2 Pro is the most advanced multimodal model developed by <a href="https://fish.audio/" rel="nofollow">Fish Audio</a>. Trained on over <strong>10 million hours</strong> of audio data covering more than <strong>80 languages</strong>, S2 Pro combines a <strong>Dual-Autoregressive (Dual-AR)</strong> architecture with reinforcement learning (RL) alignment to generate speech that is exceptionally natural, realistic, and emotionally rich, leading the competition among both open-source and closed-source systems.</p>
<p dir="auto">The core strength of S2 Pro lies in its support for <strong>sub-word level</strong> fine-grained control of prosody and emotion using natural language tags (e.g., <code>[whisper]</code>, <code>[excited]</code>, <code>[angry]</code>), while natively supporting multi-speaker and multi-turn conversation generation.</p>
<p dir="auto">Visit the <a href="https://fish.audio/" rel="nofollow">Fish Audio website</a> for a live playground, or read our <a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08823" rel="nofollow">technical report</a> and <a href="https://fish.audio/blog/fish-audio-open-sources-s2/" rel="nofollow">blog post</a> for more details.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Model Variants</h3><a id="user-content-model-variants" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Model Variants" href="#model-variants"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">On Seed-TTS Eval, S2 achieves the lowest WER among all evaluated models including closed-source systems: Qwen3-TTS (0.77/1.24), MiniMax Speech-02 (0.99/1.90), Seed-TTS (1.12/2.25). On the Audio Turing Test, 0.515 surpasses Seed-TTS (0.417) by 24% and MiniMax-Speech (0.387) by 33%. On EmergentTTS-Eval, S2 achieves particularly strong results in paralinguistics (91.61% win rate), questions (84.41%), and syntactic complexity (83.39%).</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Highlights</h2><a id="user-content-highlights" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Highlights" href="#highlights"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Fine-Grained Inline Control via Natural Language</h3><a id="user-content-fine-grained-inline-control-via-natural-language" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Fine-Grained Inline Control via Natural Language" href="#fine-grained-inline-control-via-natural-language"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">S2 Pro brings unprecedented "soul" to speech. Using simple <code>[tag]</code> syntax, you can precisely embed emotional instructions at any position in the text.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>15,000+ Unique Tags Supported</strong>: Not limited to fixed presets; S2 supports <strong>free-form text descriptions</strong>. Try <code>[whisper in small voice]</code>, <code>[professional broadcast tone]</code>, or <code>[pitch up]</code>.</li>
<li><strong>Rich Emotion Library</strong>:
<code>[pause]</code> <code>[emphasis]</code> <code>[laughing]</code> <code>[inhale]</code> <code>[chuckle]</code> <code>[tsk]</code> <code>[singing]</code> <code>[excited]</code> <code>[laughing tone]</code> <code>[interrupting]</code> <code>[chuckling]</code> <code>[excited tone]</code> <code>[volume up]</code> <code>[echo]</code> <code>[angry]</code> <code>[low volume]</code> <code>[sigh]</code> <code>[low voice]</code> <code>[whisper]</code> <code>[screaming]</code> <code>[shouting]</code> <code>[loud]</code> <code>[surprised]</code> <code>[short pause]</code> <code>[exhale]</code> <code>[delight]</code> <code>[panting]</code> <code>[audience laughter]</code> <code>[with strong accent]</code> <code>[volume down]</code> <code>[clearing throat]</code> <code>[sad]</code> <code>[moaning]</code> <code>[shocked]</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Innovative Dual-Autoregressive (Dual-AR) Architecture</h3><a id="user-content-innovative-dual-autoregressive-dual-ar-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Innovative Dual-Autoregressive (Dual-AR) Architecture" href="#innovative-dual-autoregressive-dual-ar-architecture"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">S2 Pro adopts a master-slave Dual-AR architecture consisting of a decoder-only transformer and an RVQ audio codec (10 codebooks, ~21 Hz):</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Slow AR (4B parameters)</strong>: Operates along the time axis, predicting the primary semantic codebook.</li>
<li><strong>Fast AR (400M parameters)</strong>: Generates the remaining 9 residual codebooks at each time step, reconstructing exquisite acoustic details.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">This asymmetric design achieves peak audio fidelity while significantly boosting inference speed.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Reinforcement Learning (RL) Alignment</h3><a id="user-content-reinforcement-learning-rl-alignment" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Reinforcement Learning (RL) Alignment" href="#reinforcement-learning-rl-alignment"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">S2 Pro utilizes <strong>Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)</strong> for post-training alignment. We use the same model suite for data cleaning and annotation directly as Reward Models, perfectly resolving the distribution mismatch between pre-training data and post-training objectives.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Multi-Dimensional Reward Signals</strong>: Comprehensively evaluates semantic accuracy, instruction adherence, acoustic preference scoring, and timbre similarity to ensure every second of generated speech feels intuitive to humans.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Extreme Streaming Performance (Powered by SGLang)</h3><a id="user-content-extreme-streaming-performance-powered-by-sglang" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Extreme Streaming Performance (Powered by SGLang)" href="#extreme-streaming-performance-powered-by-sglang"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">As the Dual-AR architecture is structurally isomorphic to standard LLMs, S2 Pro natively supports all SGLang inference acceleration features, including Continuous Batching, Paged KV Cache, CUDA Graph, and RadixAttention-based Prefix Caching.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Performance on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Real-Time Factor (RTF)</strong>: 0.195</li>
<li><strong>Time-to-First-Audio (TTFA)</strong>: ~100 ms</li>
<li><strong>Extreme Throughput</strong>: 3,000+ acoustic tokens/s while maintaining RTF < 0.5</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Robust Multilingual Support</h3><a id="user-content-robust-multilingual-support" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Robust Multilingual Support" href="#robust-multilingual-support"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">S2 Pro supports over 80 languages without requiring phonemes or language-specific preprocessing:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Tier 1</strong>: Japanese (ja), English (en), Chinese (zh)</li>
<li><strong>Tier 2</strong>: Korean (ko), Spanish (es), Portuguese (pt), Arabic (ar), Russian (ru), French (fr), German (de)</li>
<li><strong>Global Coverage</strong>: sv, it, tr, no, nl, cy, eu, ca, da, gl, ta, hu, fi, pl, et, hi, la, ur, th, vi, jw, bn, yo, xsl, cs, sw, nn, he, ms, uk, id, kk, bg, lv, my, tl, sk, ne, fa, af, el, bo, hr, ro, sn, mi, yi, am, be, km, is, az, sd, br, sq, ps, mn, ht, ml, sr, sa, te, ka, bs, pa, lt, kn, si, hy, mr, as, gu, fo, etc.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Native Multi-Speaker Generation</h3><a id="user-content-native-multi-speaker-generation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Native Multi-Speaker Generation" href="#native-multi-speaker-generation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="/fishaudio/fish-speech/blob/main/docs/assets/chattemplate.png"><img src="/fishaudio/fish-speech/raw/main/docs/assets/chattemplate.png" width="200%" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>
<p dir="auto">Fish Audio S2 allows users to upload reference audio containing multiple speakers, and the model processes each speaker's features via the <code><|speaker:i|></code> token. You can then control the model's performance via speaker ID tokens, enabling a single generation to include multiple speakers. There is no longer a need to upload separate reference audio for each individual speaker.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Multi-Turn Generation</h3><a id="user-content-multi-turn-generation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Multi-Turn Generation" href="#multi-turn-generation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Thanks to the expansion of the model context, our model can now leverage previous information to improve the expressiveness of subsequent generated content, thereby increasing the naturalness of the dialogue.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Rapid Voice Cloning</h3><a id="user-content-rapid-voice-cloning" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Rapid Voice Cloning" href="#rapid-voice-cloning"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Fish Audio S2 supports accurate voice cloning using short reference samples (typically 10-30 seconds). The model captures timbre, speaking style, and emotional tendencies, producing realistic and consistent cloned voices without additional fine-tuning.
For SGLang Server usage, please refer to the <a href="https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang-omni/blob/main/sglang_omni/models/fishaudio_s2_pro/README.md">SGLang-Omni README</a>.</p>
<hr>
